demonstrated_techniques: depth perception training with sugar cubes
tissue handling with delicate materials (flower petals, Brussels sprouts)
fine motor control with small objects (Cheerios)
common_errors_addressed: avoiding excessive force that could damage delicate tissues
proper instrument positioning for optimal control
maintaining steady hand movements for precise manipulation

confidence_rationale: Clear educational presentation showing various laparoscopic training exercises with expert-level technique demonstration. Not an FLS task performance but instructional content about box training alternatives.
technique_summary: Comprehensive demonstration of low-cost laparoscopic training alternatives using household items to develop fundamental skills including dexterity, depth perception, and two-handed coordination.
